The IRL Method

How Our Platform Works

Subscribe once, explore forever. We match you with curated real-life experiences based on your personality and interests — no endless scrolling needed.

1
Create your profile
Tell us your interests, availability, and whether you prefer solo or group experiences. Takes 2 minutes.
2
Subscribe for ₩12,000/mo
Unlock your monthly curated list of recommended experiences across Seoul — personally matched to you.
3
Browse & reserve
Pick the experiences you love and book directly. Experiences are priced separately — pay only for what you go to.
4
Show up & connect
Arrive, meet people, make memories. That's it. No apps during the experience — just real life.

Our Story

Built for Seoul's Real People

IRL was born from a simple frustration — Seoul is full of incredible things to do, but too many people, both locals and expats, spend their evenings alone scrolling. We built a platform to change that.

Bilingual & Bicultural
Every experience is designed to be welcoming for both Korean speakers and English-speaking foreigners. Language is never a barrier.
Personally Curated
We don't just list events. Our team hand-picks and vets every experience so you only see quality recommendations that match your vibe.
Affordable by Design
A subscription that costs less than your morning coffee per week. Experiences priced fairly and transparently — no hidden fees.

Simple Pricing

One Plan. Unlimited Discovery.

Subscribe monthly and get access to your personalised experience feed. Cancel anytime.

Monthly Subscription

₩12,000/month

Less than two cups of coffee. Unlock Seoul's best experiences.

  • Monthly curated experience list
  • Personalised recommendations
  • Solo or group registrations
  • Bilingual event support (KO/EN)
  • Early access to new events
  • Member community & chat
